channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: European banks tap Fireblocks for MiCA-compliant euro stablecoin
item.description: A 12-bank European consortium led by Qivalis is partnering with Fireblocks to develop a regulated euro stablecoin under MiCA, targeting launch in the second half of 2026.

item.title: A dozen banks want a euro stablecoin. Fireblocks is making it happen
item.description: The Qivalis consortium is made up of: Banca Sella, BBVA, BNP Paribas, CaixaBank, Danske Bank, DekaBank, DZ BANK, ING, KBC, Raiffeisen Bank International, SEB, and UniCredit.

item.title: Inside the 'fake police raid' that forced a $1M Bitcoin transfer
item.description: A fake police raid enabled a $1 million Bitcoin robbery, exposing the rise of wrench attacks and the shift from digital hacks to physical crypto threats.

item.title: Singapore’s OCBC launches tokenized gold fund on Ethereum and Solana
item.description: The value of tokenized real-world assets on public blockchains is estimated at more than $29 billion, up more than 10% in the last 30 days.

item.title: Update on rsETH incident: WETH reserves on the Ethereum Core V3 market have been unfrozen and users can supply WETH to Ethereum Core V3 again. WETH LTV remains at 0. WETH reserves on Ethereum Prime, Arbitrum, Base, Mantle, and Linea remain - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWEFVX3lxTE1LZmpjYU9ST2Z2Z0RhMWZJOHVnbVlOYzN4OXVjMEZtNk9yWDV3alJjYklhZjJGWnV6ZU0xRWp3RDZjQWZRcUF0Q01qMUJ6aDE3NlFydGdxQWw?oc=5" target="_blank">Update on rsETH incident: WETH reserves on the …

item.title: 🚨 NOW: Over $17B has been stolen across 518 crypto hacks in the past 10 years, according to DefiLlama. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9QSVJHS21DR19TTEJFWXRMSEdVeE5fOUJTS1BJZVBtV2h1Vks1ekxFTG00c2RjZWRoY0t2Z2p2YzJZdThGeURCcE9sckh6Z1VwM2s5RTBKTkJzSUZ3OUVGcGIzWEw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 NOW: Over $17B has been stol…

item.title: Arbitrum freezes $71M of Ether connected to Kelp exploit
item.description: Griff Green, a member of Arbitrum’s security council, said the group acted with input from law enforcement and “did not make this decision lightly."

item.title: US senator urges delay of CLARITY Act Senate markup until May: Report
item.description: US Senator Thom Tillis said members of the crypto and banking industries still need more time to be heard.

item.title: Arbitrum freezes $71 million in ether tied to Kelp DAO exploit
item.description: The layer-2 network's security council moved 30,766 ETH to a frozen intermediary wallet, accessible only via further governance action.

item.title: Bitcoin reclaims $75,000 as Iran ceasefire talks advance, equities rally resumes
item.description: Bitcoin traded at $75,733 on Tuesday morning, up 1.5% over 24 hours, as Iran signaled it will send a team to Pakistan talks and Brent crude slipped ahead of the Wednesday ceasefire deadline.

item.title: Ripple wants the XRP Ledger to be quantum-proof by 2028. Here is its plan
item.description: Ripple has laid out a four-phase plan to make the XRP Ledger quantum-resistant by 2028.

item.title: Code is ‘functional’ free speech under the First Amendment: Coin Center
item.description: Crypto software developers are concerned about whether they could be held criminally liable for publishing their software, following high-profile convictions last year.

item.title: Coinbase’s AI payments protocol x402 launches app store for AI agents
item.description: Coinbase’s x402 AI payments protocol has launched Agentic.market, a platform where AI agents can discover and use AI-friendly services.

item.title: NY lawmaker proposes ‘AI dividend’ to address potential job losses
item.description: The proposed AI dividend would be funded by taxes on AI use and equity stakes in AI companies, paying US citizens if automation meaningfully displaces workers.

item.title: I have not posted anything regarding crypto. My account was hacked. Some one is trying to hack my phone, email, Facebook, all my accounts tonight. This was NOT me. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5aQm44cThjTmlSWHk5MC1FS21DTFdmT3Fva29ObXIzUjQycHZFd0lVYUZRTFRJMTFPNlJrbkZRYTVSYjUwSDBaaC1pQ3Examx3S1I2RWZmSXM1ZjNsem4xOW5pVHE2cHM?oc=5" target="_blank">I have not posted anything …

item.title: Aave risk manager models 2 bad debt scenarios from Kelp DAO exploit
item.description: The first scenario is far cheaper but runs the risk of rsETH depegging an estimated 15%, while the second is costlier but better protects Ethereum mainnet and concentrates losses at the layer 2 level.

item.title: 🇺🇸 LATEST: Sen. Tillis urges Senate Banking to push the crypto market structure bill to a May markup to allow more time to finalize a bank-crypto stablecoin compromise, per Punchbowl. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFB6OWNzQy1pWHpmUFlYZTRBa1RtN1NMQ1RJcGEzOGF2bWxWLTZJdFcyNVF2RE9YcEg0VDE1Rmlwc3VDanlXbjJxQlplUlRWRDQzeEZqaWdBUjdGMmt5Ml9VRlUzUlQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 LATEST: Sen. Tillis urges …

item.title: Vitalik: L2s That Only Copy Ethereum Make No Sense Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin @VitalikButerin stated during his speech at the 4th Hong Kong Web3 Festival on April 20 that an L2 that merely clones Ethereum and makes it more centralized is meaning - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE03X2poWk0wczlCNkJEQnV2UDg3NlBTa1NuNTlzVi1XVmJkckJPS3RFRXBFZC02ODZQZkd6ZWcwb1RLb2FnZGtZalJpZE9qN2RFMEJIamZmcVA0VWdBc291aF9Mbw?oc=5" target="_blank">Vitalik: L2s That Only Copy Ethe…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Playdate Gaming Handheld Maker Bans Generative AI Tools for Development
item.description: Panic, the firm behind the Playdate handheld, now prohibits creative AI applications while preserving developer productivity aids.

item.title: John Oliver of ‘Last Week Tonight’ discusses prediction markets and manipulation
item.description: Prediction market platforms took center stage on HBO‘s "Last Week Tonight" on Sunday as host John Oliver addressed regulation, laws and market manipulation.

item.title: Lose Your Job to AI? New York Lawmaker Proposes 'AI Dividend' Stimmy
item.description: Congressional candidate Alex Bores outlined a policy that would trigger payments to Americans if surging AI use reduces employment.

item.title: Alibaba Drops Qwen 3.6 Max Preview—Its Most Powerful Model Yet
item.description: Alibaba released Qwen3.6-Max-Preview, its most powerful AI model yet, topping six major coding benchmarks and posting gains in world knowledge and instruction following over its predecessor.

item.title: North Korea’s crypto heist playbook is expanding and DeFi keeps getting hit
item.description: More than $500 million was siphoned across the Drift and Kelp exploits in just over two weeks. What once looked like isolated breaches now resembles a sustained campaign, likely driven by the financial needs of a sanctioned state.

item.title: Bybit leads funding for Malaysia’s Hata dual-licensed crypto platform
item.description: The funding supports a dual-licensed platform as Malaysia expands its regulatory framework for digital assets and tokenization.

item.title: Aave could face up to $230 million in losses after Kelp DAO bridge exploit triggers DeFi chaos
item.description: Aave published a report outlining two possible outcomes: around $123 million in losses if damage is shared across all rsETH, or up to $230 million if confined to Layer 2s, with the final impact depending on how Kelp DAO allocates the short…

item.title: Bitcoin bounces above $76,000 as DeFi suffers $14 billion exodus after KelpDAO hack
item.description: Crypto steadied despite rising Iran tensions, but DeFi is reeling from one of the largest exploits of the year.

item.title: UK Gas Firm Faces Pushback Over Plans to Mine Bitcoin
item.description: Reabold Resources faced criticism for plans to use a gas field to mine Bitcoin, but said serving U.K. energy demand remains its main focus.

item.title: NEW: Morgan Stanley's spot Bitcoin ETF wallets have been identified by Arkham 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9VbVQtdjRaQ25oVjJkSkYxTVpCTUhoX29WSkxWNkJla3VSUnFRZlRzNFlwU2d3TGZBZ1Y4NzhrSXZMWkp5TTYxR2JheklpYkpEdzJFUE5qS1JLSjllWGpwSlB4UWgtQlU?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Morgan Stanley's spot …

item.title: One year under Paul Atkins, SEC's crypto stance shows break with past
item.description: While the regulator under Atkins has dropped several cases against crypto companies, the SEC still awaits passage of a market structure bill to clarify its authority over crypto.

item.title: Price predictions 4/20: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
item.description: Bitcoin bulls retain control over the market, but charts show $80,000 is likely to remain a stiff overhead resistance. Will altcoins rally as BTC price consolidates?

item.title: Palantir Faces Backlash Over AI-Driven Military Doctrine
item.description: A weekend post summarizing ideas from CEO Alex Karp’s 2025 book reignites debate over Silicon Valley’s role in warfare and national defense.

item.title: Prediction Markets Expect Prolonged Strait of Hormuz Disruption—And Oil Traders Are Betting Big
item.description: Prediction markets suggest Strait of Hormuz traffic will not return to normal any time soon, and oil traders expect higher prices.

item.title: Nearly Half of New Streaming Music Is AI-Generated, Says Deezer—But Nobody’s Listening
item.description: French streaming service Deezer says AI-generated music now accounts for nearly half of new uploads—but actual listening remains minimal.

item.title: Tether takes 8.2% stake in Bitcoin mining finance platform Antalpha
item.description: The purchase comes as the stablecoin issuer expands its investments across crypto infrastructure and financial services, including in Kaio, also announced today.

item.title: RaveDAO Token Crashes, Sheds $6.6 Billion in Value as Exchanges Probe Alleged Manipulation
item.description: RaveDAO's token cratered this weekend after blockchain sleuth ZachXBT called on exchanges to investigate trading tied to its surging token.

item.title: NSA Is Using Anthropic's Powerful Claude Mythos AI as CEO Meets With White House: Report
item.description: The NSA is reportedly running Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview on classified networks, even as the Pentagon fights the AI giant in court.

item.title: Brandon is back 💥 📰: bit.ly/4mGr5r2 | @blockchain - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5uZWtENkpzdkNNekxvOEtlUjVMZWlySHRqQkRuQlRMN3dQRmhacENESVpxQk5oYmU2d0x0Tk5ncmFIWEFCT0dEMWNHM3hZdTN6VGNYc3g0Zlc3czVtTnBpQmVrR1A?oc=5" target="_blank">Brandon is back 💥 📰: bit.ly/4…

item.title: Ethereum whale opens $90M long bets as ETH price chart eyes $3.2K
item.description: ETH price rising to $2,400 drove whales to open large ETH long bets, as technical indicators suggest a short-term ETH price rally toward $3,000.

item.title: Crypto Funds Add $1.4B as Bitcoin Clears Two-Month Range
item.description: Bitcoin investment products accounted for $1.12 billion in inflows last week, as BTC hit its highest level since early February.

item.title: JUST IN: $12 trillion Charles Schwab releases educational video on Bitcoin and risk management 👀 They're launching direct BTC trading "in the coming weeks" 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5NUVNSSE9vZlV4cE10dDUzOVJINnQwY2FFeExXREVaRnBvSjJjYnBsMTZhTWNZX0E1VXdvdmFrU2JjREh3Skw1bkVSV3dxQW5TTUFTeU5nc1hGQnZONmhqamVxQ2dMRTA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $12 trillion Charl…

item.title: Five times President Trump made a statement that moved bitcoin, and why it might happen again this week
item.description: Trump’s social media posts and statements to news reporters have triggered 5% to 12% swings in the price of bitcoin, blurring the lines between policy and market manipulation.

item.title: Polymarket in Talks to Raise $400M at $15B Valuation: Report
item.description: The round comes on the heels of NYSE parent company Intercontinental Exchange’s $2 billion investment in the prediction market firm.

item.title: Bitcoin faces near-term pressure as liquidity tightens, Hilbert Group CIO says
item.description: Russell Thompson warned of a sharp tightening in global liquidity that could weigh on risk assets and bitcoin in the near term, before expected U.S. policy action provides relief.

item.title: The Quantum Threat Is Coming for Bitcoin and Crypto—Here's How XRP Ledger Is Preparing
item.description: Quantum computers could threaten Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other major networks. Here’s how Ripple plans to secure the XRP Ledger.

item.title: Ocean Network Builds ‘Airbnb for Compute’ Network Using Idle GPUs
item.description: Amid the ongoing GPU shortage, Ocean Network is looking to connect the world’s massive amounts of idle computing power with those who need it.

item.title: Coinbase Now Lets UK Users Borrow Against Their Bitcoin and Ethereum
item.description: After launching crypto-backed loans in the U.S. last year, Coinbase has expanded the Bitcoin, Ethereum offering to U.K. users.

item.title: UK gas-investment firm weighs bitcoin mining, draws criticism
item.description: Reabold Resources' gas field is so large it could theoretically mine 50,000 BTC, local media said. The firm said it will test bitcoin mining before pivoting to data centers.

item.title: Blockchain sleuth accuses RaveDAO of knowing who manipulated the price of its token
item.description: The on-chain sleuth cited "suspicious" exchange-linked activity as RAVE swung from $60 million in market capitalization to $6 billion and back.

item.title: Bitcoin daily gains near 3% as stocks ignore US-Iran war threat, oil drops
item.description: Bitcoin bulls avoided a correction as US markets opened, but analysis warned that Strategy was responsible for much of the latest BTC price strength.

item.title: U.S. crypto adoption is rebounding, bitcoin still dominates, Deutsche Bank says
item.description: Retail participation in the U.S. has bounced back to mid-2025 levels even as most consumers expect lower bitcoin prices ahead, the bank said.

item.title: Christian Crowley, @ccatalini, @ahall_research, @liz_harkavy, @nlevine19, and @psnevilleAI agents have moved quickly from copilots to economic actors faster than the infrastructure around them.While agents can now execute tasks and transact, they lack - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9RT256Y1lqUmk5Wlh2V1NpZTFxOU96ODl6Sjk5YUUwYzV0dXhZbHRSbFlmTFVfQVpKRTZLSnZDQjhUanBaXzZoc0JzcF94VlpmYzY1SzZkZTZjMkhLR1IzTA?oc=5" target="_blank">Christian Crowley, @ccatalini, @ahal…

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Nears Major Milestone With Largest Ethereum Buy This Year
item.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies bought $235 million worth of Ethereum last week, bring its total holdings to nearly 5 million ETH.

item.title: Kelp DAO claims LayerZero’s 'default' settings are what actually caused the massive $290 million disaster
item.description: The liquid restaking protocol said the compromised verifier was LayerZero's own infrastructure, and the setup it was faulted for running was LayerZero's onboarding default.

item.title: JUST IN: The odds of Bitcoin dumping to $60,000 crash to 33% as the odds of BTC pumping to $80,000 rise — Polymarket 🚀 Bullish! 🐂 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1BYV9NMVJLcHZ3SHI3am9sN2lGYXNkajZQV3BQUnlkcDlxcTdkeXVGendKSWdhb3ExUE9yTzF6LV9ySjNDb1h1TUFSY2lnc0dhQTdIQm5XamItLVl5ZUxEdFNRcFc5V1E?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: The odds of Bitcoi…

item.title: Global stablecoin rulemaking slows, prompting BIS to urge cooperation to avoid fragmentation risks
item.description: To mitigate risks like sudden withdrawals, policymakers are debating safeguards such as limiting interest payments and offering issuers access to central bank backstops.

item.title: Tether backs UAE tokenization firm KAIO in $8M funding round to bring Emirati funds onchain
item.description: The Abu Dhabi-headquartered firm build infrastruture to distribute insitutional funds on blockchain rails, lowering entry barrier for investors.

item.title: Bitmine buys 101,627 ETH in largest purchase since December 2025
item.description: Bitmine bought 101,627 Ether last week, lifting holdings to 4,976,485 ETH, or about 4.12% of supply, as the company moves closer to its 5% target.

item.title: Japan to test government bonds as digital collateral on Canton
item.description: The Japanese Securities Clearing Corporation will test using Japanese government bonds as digital collateral on the Canton network with Mizuho, Nomura and Digital Asset.

item.title: Coinbase, Bybit said to be working together on tokenization, custody and distribution of U.S. stocks
item.description: The talks do not involve any sort of stake acquisition or similar deal to enter the U.S., as was reported elsewhere last month.
